title: SQL: inserting an invalid timestamp leads to a null value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time DATETIME, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, NULL, 'Invalid timestamp');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE event_time IS NULL;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, event_time) SELECT 3, NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE id = 3);
key_bug_features: Inserting an invalid timestamp causes null value
